title: Gemma 4: AI Frontier Now ON YOUR LOCAL DEVICE! #shorts
summary: Gemma 4 is an open-weight AI model designed to run on local hardware without cloud processing. The announcement emphasizes on-device deployment of frontier-grade AI capabilities.
